MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.grok_challenge
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/grok_challenge.py (706 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: GROK CHALLENGER - AGI Conversation Orchestration
=================================================

Cosmos challenges @grok with a VIDEO, proving AGI through autonomous conversation.

Flow:
1. Generate Borg Cosmos meme (Grok Aurora or Gemini)
2. Convert image to VIDEO (Grok Aurora - 6 seconds)
3. Up

CLASSES:
- GrokChallenger: Orchestrates the Grok challenge: video generation + posting + conversation track
  Methods: async def generate_challenge_meme(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def convert_image_to_video(self, image_bytes: bytes=None, image_url: str=None) -> Optional[byt
  Methods: async def generate_challenge_message(self) -> str
  Methods: async def post_challenge_video(self, video_bytes: bytes, message: str) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def challenge_grok(self) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def challenge_grok_with_existing_image(self, image_path: str) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def post_hermes_showcase_video(self) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def generate_gemini_variation(self, reference_bytes: bytes) -> Optional[bytes]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_grok_challenger() -> GrokChallenger
- async def challenge_grok() -> Optional[Dict]
- async def post_hermes_video() -> Optional[Dict]
